headline: How Investors May Respond To Dominion Energy (D) Earnings Dip, Dividend Hold And ESG Pay Rebuff
summary: In early May 2026, Dominion Energy reported first-quarter 2026 sales of US$5,019 million and net income of US$621 million, modestly below the prior year, while also affirming a quarterly dividend of US$0.6675 per share and filing a US$3.00 billion floating-rate demand notes shelf registration with a dividend reinvestment feature. At the same time, shareholders voted down proposals on tying executive pay more closely to ESG and DEI metrics, mandating an independent chair, and expanding...
